coffee.name: Kawa Espresso
coffee.description: Bold single-origin Rwandan espresso, rich and smooth with a caramel finish.

coffee.name: Flat White
coffee.description: Velvety microfoam milk poured over a double ristretto shot.

coffee.name: Cappuccino
coffee.description: Equal parts espresso, steamed milk, and thick milk foam. A classic done right.

coffee.name: Café Latte
coffee.description: Smooth espresso with steamed milk and a light layer of foam.

coffee.name: Cold Brew
coffee.description: Steeped for 18 hours, smooth and refreshing with zero bitterness.

coffee.name: Rwandan Pour Over
coffee.description: Single-origin beans from Huye Mountain, brewed slowly for full clarity.

specialty.name: Kawa Signature Latte
specialty.description: House blend with cinnamon, cardamom, and a touch of honey. Our most loved drink.

specialty.name: Matcha Latte
specialty.description: Ceremonial-grade matcha whisked with oat milk. Earthy, creamy, and calming.

specialty.name: Hibiscus Iced Tea
specialty.description: Refreshing Rwandan hibiscus brewed and served over ice with a hint of ginger.

specialty.name: Mango Smoothie
specialty.description: Fresh local mangoes blended with yogurt and a splash of passion fruit.

specialty.name: Spiced Hot Chocolate
specialty.description: Dark Rwandan cocoa with cinnamon, nutmeg, and steamed whole milk.

specialty.name: Turmeric Golden Latte
specialty.description: Turmeric, black pepper, ginger, and oat milk. Anti-inflammatory and delicious.

snacks.name: Mandazi
snacks.description: Light, fluffy East African doughnuts with a hint of coconut. Served warm.

snacks.name: Avocado Toast
snacks.description: Sourdough with smashed avocado, chili flakes, and a poached egg.

snacks.name: Banana Bread Slice
snacks.description: Moist, homemade banana bread with walnuts. Pairs perfectly with coffee.

snacks.name: Cheese & Veggie Sandwich
snacks.description: Fresh vegetables, local cheese, and house-made pesto on toasted ciabatta.

snacks.name: Chocolate Brownie
snacks.description: Rich, fudgy brownie made with Rwandan dark chocolate. A daily indulgence.

snacks.name: Granola Bowl
snacks.description: House granola, Greek yogurt, seasonal fruits, and a drizzle of local honey.
